title: Verify existing implementation of sum utility function
description: The sum utility function and its test file already exist and fully satisfy all acceptance criteria. `src/utils/sum.ts` exports a default `sum` function with signature `(numbers: number[]) => number` that handles empty arrays (returns 0). `src/utils/sum.test.ts` contains comprehensive unit tests covering empty arrays, single elements, multiple numbers, negative numbers, and floating point precision.
existing_patterns: Utility modules in `src/utils/` follow single-function file pattern with co-located `.test.ts` files
